name: Asyano The Asian Store
description:
Asyano The Asian Store is a family-run Filipino and Asian grocery shop located at the Butler Homemaker Centre in northern Perth. Serving as a welcoming local 'sari-sari' store, it specialises in bringing authentic tastes of the Philippines and broader Asia closer to the Western Australian community. Originally situated near the Clarkson train station, the business has relocated to a much larger, brighter, and well-organised space in Butler to better serve its growing customer base.

Local shoppers highly praise the store for its friendly service, tidy layout, and spacious aisles that make browsing comfortable. The shop is well-stocked with a wide range of popular Filipino goods, frozen items, fresh produce, and specialty snacks. Customers particularly love finding hard-to-find ingredients, traditional treats, and seasonal items like puto bumbong cake mix. The owners are known for going the extra mile, often helping customers source specific products or setting items aside for collection.

Conveniently located with plenty of parking at the homemaker centre, Asyano The Asian Store is a favourite destination for the local Filipino-Australian community to stock up on household staples and nostalgic snacks from home.

name: Aussie Balikbayan Boxes - Midland
description:
Aussie Balikbayan Boxes - Midland, operating within the Filipino Oriental Store, is a key hub for the local Filipino-Australian community in Perth's eastern suburbs. Conveniently located on The Crescent in Midland, this versatile business specialises in essential services and imported goods from the Philippines.

As an official outlet for Aussie Balikbayan Boxes, they provide reliable cargo and door-to-door freight forwarding services, helping families send packages back home to their loved ones. In addition to shipping, the store offers Western Union money transfer services, offering competitive exchange rates and a straightforward way to send remittance.

Inside, visitors will find a cosy retail space stocked with a popular range of Filipino groceries and household favourites, including pantry staples like bagoong and various native snacks. Customers appreciate the convenient selection of authentic ingredients and the friendly, accommodating staff at the counter. For those looking for a quick treat, the store also serves hot beverages like cappuccino, with staff known to go the extra mile to customise drinks. Whether you are sending a balikbayan box, remitting funds, or shopping for familiar Filipino comfort foods, this friendly local centre offers a welcoming and convenient one-stop experience.

name: Filipino Chaplaincy of the Diocese of Parramatta
description: A verified Filipino church in Perth.

name: Kali Sikaran Wangara
description: Kali Sikaran Wangara offers structured classes in Filipino Martial Arts (FMA) at Shobukan Martial Arts in Wangara, Western Australia. Affiliated with Kali Sikaran International, the program integrates weapon-based training with empty-hand self-defence skills.

name: Kalye Filipino Streats
description: A popular Filipino street food eatery located in Northbridge, Perth. Kalye Filipino Streats serves a variety of authentic street food favorites, including pares with bone marrow, lechon kawali, sisig, lugaw, and various grilled skewers.

name: Kazoku Ai
description: A family-owned Japanese and Filipino restaurant located in the Spencer Village Food Court in Thornlie, Perth. Serving a delicious blend of Japanese cuisine and traditional Filipino favorites like sisig.

name: Keni Donut and Cafe
description: Homemade and handcrafted artisan doughnuts and treats that bring people together to reminisce and create new shared memories.

name: Kiwinoy Diner
description: A verified Filipino restaurant in Perth.

name: Kusina Republik
description: Kusina Republik is a traditional Filipino eatery and karinderya located in Huntingdale, WA. It is well-known for serving delicious lutong-bahay (home-cooked style) Filipino dishes, including pork BBQ skewers, beef caldereta, chicken tinola, and crispy pata. The restaurant features a cozy, welcoming atmosphere and offers both dine-in and takeaway options.

name: LINK STUDIO (CAPTAIN BARBER)
description: Filipino-inspired barbershop and hair styling studio located in Crossways Shopping Centre, Subiaco.

name: LUMA
description: A Filipino restaurant and pop-up dining experience in East Perth, serving silog bowls, tocilog (bacon tocino), bistek sandos, and fine-dining quality Filipino dishes like roasted eggplant on peanut sauce.

name: Lamesa Filipino Scottish Restaurant
description: A verified Filipino cafe in Perth.

name: Llara Tax And Accounting
description: Llara Tax And Accounting, led by Chartered Accountant Lilibeth De Asis, provides professional accounting, tax compliance, bookkeeping, and business advisory services in Perth, Western Australia.

name: Lola's Biggest Handmade Spring Rolls
description: Lola's Biggest Handmade Spring Rolls is a beloved Filipino food stall located inside the historic Fremantle Markets. Carrying forward a grandmother's treasured recipes, they specialize in freshly hand-rolled, extra-large lumpia (spring rolls) packed with flavorful ingredients. Customer favorites include their roast duck, roast pork, and vegan spring rolls. Perfect for dine-in or as a quick takeaway snack, they also offer frozen spring rolls to cook at home.

name: Lola's Grilled Chicken
description: A popular Filipino grilled chicken restaurant previously located in Thornlie, WA, known for serving delicious traditional Filipino comfort food, inasal, and snacks. The establishment is now permanently closed.

name: Lola’s Asian Grocery and Kitchen
description: Home of Authentic Pinoy Goodies and Flavors. Shop Asian groceries, enjoy home-style dishes (like fresh taho and traditional food), and feel right at home at Lola’s Asian Grocery & Kitchen.

name: MFAMCI - Mandurah Filipino Australian Multicultural Community Incorporation
description: Mandurah Filipino Australian Multicultural Community Incorporation (MFAMCI) is a community organization based in Mandurah, Western Australia. Operating out of the Greenfields Family & Community Centre, MFAMCI offers opportunities for learning and community engagement, including cooking demonstrations, sewing, and speech craft classes, as well as talent showcase at community markets.

name: MSA Immigration
description: MSA Immigration is an education and migration consultancy firm based in Subiaco, Perth, Western Australia, with a regional office in Ortigas Centre, Pasig City, Philippines. Led by Principal Migration Advisor Christmarie Tentia, the firm specializes in providing personalized, professional visa services, including skilled migration pathways, student visas, and partner or family visas, offering tailored guidance to Filipino applicants looking to build a new life in Australia.

name: Maid By Yv
description: Residential & commercial cleaning service in Perth, WA. Combining a background in early childhood education with a personal passion for cleaning, Yvonne Masilang established the company with an all-Filipino team.

name: Mandurah Filipino Sports Club
description: Mandurah Filipino Sports Club Incorporated (MFSCI) is a not-for-profit community organization based in Mandurah, Western Australia. Established in 2013, the club's objective is to provide and conduct sports activities, promoting sports as an enjoyable and healthy activity within the community. It provides opportunities for members to nurture their skills in basketball, volleyball, and a variety of other sports, encouraging community support, participation, and fostering sociability among its members.

name: Manila Mart West Ryde
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Manila Sari-Sari Store
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Mark Banaag - Estrin Saul Lawyers
description: Mark Banaag is a bilingual (Tagalog and Cebuano) lawyer and immigration specialist practicing at Estrin Saul Lawyers in Perth. Drawing on his personal journey as a migrant and extensive corporate background, Mark provides highly professional, compassionate, and culturally sensitive visa and migration advice to the Filipino-Australian community in Western Australia. He assists with a wide range of visa pathways, including employer sponsorships, partner visas, and skilled migration.

name: Meaty Choices
description: Meaty Choices is a premium family-owned Filipino butcher shop and deli located within the Malaga Markets in Malaga, Western Australia. Established by Keziah and Fernando Venturina, former veterinarians from the Philippines, the business specializes in high-quality fresh meats, custom cuts, and specialty Filipino meat products. Highly praised by the local community for its friendly and excellent service, Meaty Choices offers fresh cuts at fair prices, making it a go-to destination for authentic Filipino meats in the Perth region.

name: Melissa's Filipino Shop
description: A popular Filipino grocery store located in Huntingdale, Perth. Offering a wide range of imported Filipino groceries, snacks, ingredients, and fresh traditional baked goods to the Filipino-Australian community.

name: Midland Pinoy Grocers
description: A verified Filipino restaurant in Perth.

name: Milestone Migration
description: Milestone Migration is a professional migration agency based in Myaree, Perth, WA, led by registered migration agent Susan Marnie Cayago. They provide visa and immigration assistance for individuals and businesses.

name: Missionary Families of Christ WA
description: An evangelistic and missionary lay Catholic community of families in Perth, Western Australia (originally established under Couples for Christ). The community is dedicated to family renewal and Christian life, holding regular household prayer meetings, worship assemblies, faith sharing, and Christian Life Seminars (CLS) for the Filipino-Australian community.

name: Mr Yummmo
description: Mr Yummmo was a Filipino restaurant in Maddington, Perth, known for offering a wide range of Filipino dishes and traditional breakfast items like tapsilog and arroz caldo. It is currently permanently closed.

name: Murdoch University Filipino-Australian Student Association (MUFASA)
description: MUFASA is a Filipino culture club based in Murdoch University, run by fellow Filipino students as well as people of different cultures that share an interest in sharing and experiencing the Philippine culture.

name: Neri's Kitchen and Bakery
description: Perth's oldest Filipino bakery serving authentic Pandesal, ensaymada, silogs, coffees, and sweet treats in Bayswater.

name: Neri’s Kitchen and Bakery
description: Perth's first Pandesal bakery now serving breakfasts and lunch! Neri's Kitchen & Bakery (NKB) in Bayswater serves authentic Filipino favorites alongside Aussie cafe classics, including freshly baked pandesal, silogs, coffees, and sweet treats.

name: New Life Filipino Australian Community Church
description: A verified Filipino church in Perth.

name: Notre Dame Parish
description: Notre Dame Parish in Cloverdale is a vibrant Catholic community that hosts Simbang Gabi (traditional Filipino Christmas novena Masses) with the San Lorenzo Ruiz Choir, and features monthly Filipino community Masses and celebrations.

name: Origin Migration & Education Visa Specialists
description: Origin Migration & Education Visa Specialists is a registered migration agency based in West Perth, founded by Francis Ralph Alberto (MARN 1387488). The agency specializes in providing comprehensive visa and education consulting services, helping Filipino applicants successfully navigate Australian migration pathways, visa applications, and student enrolments with the support of their offices in Perth and the Philippines.

name: Origin Migration & Education Visa Specialists - Huntingdale
description: Origin Migration & Education Visa Specialists in Huntingdale is a branch office of the registered migration agency founded by Francis Ralph Alberto (MARN 1387488). The agency specializes in helping Filipino-Australian couples and individuals secure student, partner, skilled migration, and work visas. The Huntingdale branch provides weekend consultation options by appointment to accommodate busy client schedules, particularly serving the southern suburbs of Perth.

name: OzPinoy Productions
description: OzPinoy Productions is a Perth-based concert and event management company. It specializes in bringing premier Filipino artists, musicians, and entertainers to Western Australia, hosting vibrant cultural concerts and events for the local Filipino-Australian community.

name: PLR Balikbayan Boxes
description: PLR Balikbayan Boxes is a family-owned and operated cargo and freight business based in Perth, Western Australia, proudly serving the Filipino community since 1998. They specialize in door-to-door shipping of balikbayan boxes from the Perth metro area and regional Western Australia straight to the Philippines.

name: Pagi Pagi Coffee Perth
description: A verified Filipino cafe in Perth.

name: Pala5
description: At Pala, our love for vibrant Filipino fusion cuisine guides our menu, fusing health with irresistible flavours. We champion local and fresh ingredients, curating dishes that aren't just a treat to your taste buds, but also nourish your body. We take pride in catering to diverse dietary needs, featuring vegetarian and gluten-free options prominently. Pala isn't just about food – it's about community. We've fostered a space where every guest feels the warmth of inclusivity and genuine hospitality. Our vibrant ambiance and unwavering commitment to creating a welcoming environment establish us as the ideal spot for gatherings, events, or a comforting meal.

name: Perth Affordable Beauties PTY LTD
description: Perth Affordable Beauties PTY LTD is a specialty retailer in Morley, Perth, offering a wide range of Filipino, Thai, Japanese, and Korean beauty products, cosmetics, whitening items, vitamins, and grocery essentials. The store stocks popular Filipino brands such as Brilliant Skin, Luxe Organix, Fairy Skin, Sereese, Rosmar, and SY Glow.

name: Perth Filipino Christian Church
description: A verified Filipino church in Perth.

name: Perth Pinoy-Aus Sports Club Incorporated
description: An incorporated sporting organization based in Perth, Western Australia, dedicated to conducting, encouraging, promoting, advancing, and administering sports (including volleyball and badminton) within the Filipino-Australian community.

name: Phil-Asian Supermarket - St Marys
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Philippine Consulate in Western Australia
description: A verified Filipino government in Perth.

name: Philippine Magic Cafe Walpole
description: A verified Filipino cafe in Perth.

name: Phoenix Asian Shop
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Pinay Asian Shop
description: Pinoy Asian Shop (also known as Pinay Asian Shop) is a Filipino and Asian grocery store located at Unit 12D/40 Port Pirie St in Bibra Lake, Perth. The store stocks a wide range of authentic Filipino groceries, pantry items, traditional ingredients, and snacks, and also acts as a local agent for cargo and shipping services to the Philippines.

name: Pinoy Asian Groceries
description: Pinoy Asian Groceries in Wangara, Perth offers a wide selection of authentic Filipino products (about 70% of inventory) along with a variety of Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Indonesian, Malaysian, and Thai products. It also provides money remittance services (via Ria and Western Union) and stocks fresh traditional sweets (such as kutsinta, sapin-sapin, leche flan, biko latik, and coconut karioka).

name: Pinoy Fiesta Restaurant
description: A verified Filipino restaurant in Perth.

name: Pinoy Grocer
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Pinoy Homes Perth
description: A home building service in Perth offering affordable housing solutions and packages tailored to the Filipino-Australian community.

name: Pinoy Low Deposit Housing
description: Perth's #1 Pinoy home agents assisting the Filipino-Australian community in Western Australia with finance health checks, home loans, and land-and-house packages.

name: Pinoy Mini Mart
description: Pinoy Mini Mart is a local Filipino and Asian grocery store located at Shop 8/207 Treasure Rd in Queens Park, Perth. The shop offers a wide variety of imported Filipino ingredients, pantry staples, snacks, frozen foods, and local goods (like balut and pork cracklings), and acts as a pick-up and drop-off agent for Aussie Balikbayan Boxes shipping services.

name: Pinoy Stop (Doonside)
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Prima Resources
description: Prima Resources, in alliance with Skills Bridge Solutions and Migration Bridge, provides migrant workforce solutions for the Perth WA building and mining industries, specializing in sourcing and deploying qualified trade workers from the Philippines.

name: RMK Auto Electrical, Mechanical & Air Conditioning
description: RMK Auto Electrical, Mechanical & Air Conditioning is a mobile automotive service provider operating in the Gosnells and wider Perth metropolitan area. Owned and operated by Roderick Tuazon, a highly experienced automotive professional with over 20 years in the industry, the business offers mobile mechanical repairs, auto electrical services, and automotive air conditioning repairs directly at the customer's home or workplace. With certifications as a Dual Trade specialist, Roderick is known for his professional, reliable, and friendly service, offering quality parts and diagnostics at competitive prices. Whether it's wiring modifications, fuel injection fault finding, battery testing, starter motor diagnostics, or dual battery systems, RMK Auto provides a convenient and high-quality solution for vehicle maintenance across Perth, backed by strong community reviews.

name: Ready Eddie's Café Wanneroo
description: A family owned & operated Filipino restaurant in Wanneroo, Perth. Ready Eddie’s Cafe Wanneroo serves authentic Filipino cuisine, bringing a taste of original Filipino culinary culture. Popular menu items include sisig, beef bulalo stew, and lomi noodles.

name: Ready Eddies Cafe
description: A family owned & operated Filipino restaurant in Cockburn Central, Perth. Ready Eddie’s Cafe Cockburn serves authentic Filipino cuisine, bringing a taste of original Filipino culinary culture. Popular menu items include sisig, beef bulalo stew, and lomi noodles.

name: Ren’s Filo Mart
description: Ren's Filo Mart (also known as MV Filipino-Asian Groceries) is a Filipino and Asian grocery store located at Unit 2/8 Dewar St in Morley, Perth. The store stocks a wide range of authentic Filipino groceries, snacks, pantry items, and traditional products, and also serves as a local drop-off and agent location for Aussie Balikbayan Boxes shipping services to the Philippines.

name: Saint Mary's Cathedral
description: St Mary's Cathedral is the seat of the Roman Catholic Archbishop of Perth. It hosts monthly Filipino Masses and special liturgical celebrations (such as Simbang Gabi) for the Filipino-Australian Catholic community in Western Australia.

name: ShopWise Filipino Asian Store
description: A newly opened Filipino grocery store located in Coventry Village, Morley. Friendly staff and a wide range of affordable Filipino products and pantry staples.

name: Silog & Co. by Keni
description: A Filipino restaurant in Morley, Perth, serving traditional Filipino silog breakfast meals and other dishes.

name: St Andrew's - Clarkson Parish
description: A Catholic parish in Clarkson, Western Australia, featuring a vibrant Filipino community. The parish has a dedicated Filipino Choir performing at the 5:00 PM Sunday Mass and coordinates cultural events and devotions such as Señor Santo Niño.

name: Sugar Artist
description: Specialising in flavoured Filipino butter bun (ensaymadas) at Stall Y125 in the Fremantle Markets.

name: Suki Asian Store
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: Super Pinoy Sari-Sari Store
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: THE SANSRIVAL
description: THE SANSRIVAL is a cozy and beautifully decorated Filipino cafe located in East Perth, Western Australia. Famously known for its delicious handmade Filipino pastries and specialty cakes, it is a beloved spot for both sweet and savory treats. The menu highlights their signature honey macadamia sansrival cake—a rich, nutty, and perfectly textured traditional dessert—alongside authentic empanadas, flavorful egg drop buns, and modern ube lattes. For those seeking a savory meal, they also serve satisfying Filipino breakfast classics like To Si Log (sweet pork with garlic rice and egg). With a warm, welcoming ambiance and friendly staff, it has become a popular community hub for authentic homemade Filipino flavors.

name: Tagalog School of Perth
description: We teach Filipino, the national language of the Philippines. We offer beginner and intermediate classes and private lessons here in Perth, Western Australia.

name: The Filipino Shop
description: The Filipino Shop is a centrally located store in Perth offering Filipino groceries, remittance, tax, and postal box services.

name: The MiMada Shop
description: Bringing you a taste of home, a little bliss in every bite. The MiMada Shop serves your favorite Filipino treats, from heartwarming house-favorite meals (like pork belly and beef pares) to delicious sweet and savoury snacks, artisan ensaymada, bibingka, halo halo, coffee, and sorbets.

name: The Philippines Recruitment Company
description: The Philippines Recruitment Company is a recruitment agency based in Subiaco, Perth, specializing in sourcing and deploying skilled Filipino professionals for Australian businesses.

name: Tindahan ni Marekoy
description: A verified Filipino shop in Perth.

name: UWA Filipino-Australian Society
description: Welcome to the first Guild-affiliated Filipino Club in WA based in UWA est. 2017. — DIVERSITY • UNITY • CONTINUITY —

name: University of the Philippines Alumni Association Western Australia
description: A purpose-driven community association connecting alumni of all University of the Philippines campuses residing in Western Australia. UPAA WA organizes social, cultural, and community activities, including traditional games, visa information sessions, and local scholarship programs.

name: WA Bayanihan Sports Community Incorporated
description: WA Bayanihan Sports Community Incorporated (WABSCI) is a Filipino-Australian community sports organization based in Western Australia. It is the official organizer of the WA Pinoy Invitational Friendship Cup (WAPIFC), promoting unity, sportsmanship, and cultural connection through basketball, volleyball, and other sports tournaments for the Pinoy diaspora in WA.
